race.comment: BASSETT'S CHOICE (11) couldn't quite live up to market expectation last time at Grafton after dropping back from metro racing. Mallyon reunites and can get her bouncing back sharply. CARAMELFUDGESUNDAE (9) was far from her best last time at Sunshine Coast, so should appreciate the drop in grade. Steps back in trip off a 50-day freshen, keeping the legs ticking over with a trial in-between. Worth following up. Similarly, ODIN'S MOUNT (4) didn't fire a shot fresh but will find this easier and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley. Watch for sharp improvement. WE DO REMEMBER (14) was doing her best work late when resuming at Lismore. Kept fresh with 41 days between and is a likely improver.
